DEPT. 602 JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK IRIS HAMMER, NOT REPORTED. EUGENE A. VLAHOS, ESQ. FOR PLNTF, NO APPEARANCE BY DFT. THE COURT SIGNED THE JUDGMENT AS SUBMITTED BY COUNSEL.
